ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Pending Threshold Review') && ((ISCHANGED(Status__c) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Cancelled'))) || ISCHANGED(Recipient_Picklist__c) || ISCHANGED(Recipient__c) || ISCHANGED(OwnerId) ) && (RecordType.DeveloperName ='Supplier_Questionnaires' /* DDQ */ || RecordType.DeveloperName ='Legal_Services' /* Legal */) && ( $Profile.Name <>'SW Billing' && $Profile.Name <>'SW Billing Extended' && $Profile.Name <>'SW Legal' && $Profile.Name <>'SW SalesOps' && $Profile.Name <>'SW SalesOps Extended' && $Profile.Name <>'System Administrator' && $User.Id <> '005b0000000lqbnAAA' /*Automated Process*/ && $User.Id <> '005b0000000lqbn' /*Automated Process*/ )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Sales Profiles can edit Legal/DDQ Requests with the status "Pending Threshold Review", please contact SalesOps to review this request
